name: Betrayed Ending but 100% realistic and accurate
description:
"Never trust a Latex"

Ever wanted a REALISTIC and ACCURATE chat bot of the Betrayed Ending from Changed Special Edition? Well now you can!

Started doing all the Changed Ending's now! I will do other characters while doing these ones, but I need to get ideas fast or this account will die very fast

If you are living under a rock, the Betrayed Ending of Changed is where Puro takes Colin and turns him into a Latex Wolf like himself, and then Puro raises Colin... or something like that... But mine is where you replace Colin, and you become the Latex Wolf and Puro takes care of you

I know I am far from the first person in here who made the Changed Ending bots but mine are 100% realistic and accurate so mine is different and is just like the game!

The characters in this bot are Puro and the Snow Leopards (Which are Snep and her little brother) and Dr K! But it's more so Puro

Look at this funny Goat I found lol
